description: Content explicitly includes restaurant or food establishment opening hours, typically formatted as time ranges (e.g., 'يفتح من الساعة ٧ ص'), to facilitate customer visit planning and reduce decision friction.
structural_recipe: Embed operational hours clearly within Instagram caption using Arabic time format (24-hour or 12-hour with ص/م notation). Place near establishment name or location tag. Format as 'يفتح من الساعة [time] إلى [time]' or similar clear structure. Include in first 2-3 lines of caption before detailed descriptions to maximize visibility without expanding caption length.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers prioritize convenience and efficiency in dining decisions. Providing opening hours removes friction by answering the immediate question 'Can I go now?' before they click through or message. This demonstrates operational transparency and respect for customer time—culturally valued in Saudi service interactions. Hours availability also suggests established legitimacy and regular operations.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure hours align with Saudi prayer times and cultural observances (Iftaar times during Ramadan, Jumu'ah prayer closures)
Verify hours accuracy; incorrect timing damages credibility severely in Saudi market where word-of-mouth reputation is critical
Format must use Arabic numerals and Arabic time conventions (ص = صباحاً, م = مساءً) for accessibility to majority audience
cultural_constraints: Ramadan schedule variations must be signaled separately
Hours should reflect actual operational capacity, not aspirational timing
